    VIP Strategy 📅 Published: January 01, 2026 🔄 Updated: January 16, 2026 ⏱️ 12 min read

    Stake.us VIP Grinding Guide 2026: Make $20-$30/Day with Dice Strategy

    Bottom Line: Stake.us is a crypto sweepstakes platform where most people simply gamble and hope to win. But with the right strategy combining credit card churning, VIP rewards, rakeback, and playthrough codes, you can turn a losing proposition into consistent $20-$30 daily profit ($600-$900/month). This guide shows you exactly how.

    📑 Table of Contents

    • Strategy Overview
    • Where Your Profits Come From
    • Step-by-Step Guide
    • Optimal Dice Settings
    • The Math Behind Your Profits
    • Playthrough Codes Explained
    • Automation Tools
    • FAQ

    🎁 Sign Up to Stake.us & Get $25 FREE!

    Use my link to sign up and receive $25 in credits delivered to your email within a few days. Instantly redeemable to your crypto wallet or bank account!

    🚀 Claim Your Free $25 →
    💰
    $20-$30
    Daily Profit
    🎲
    98%
    Win Chance
    🔄
    7 Days
    Repeat Cycle
    📊
    4000SC
    Daily Limit

    Strategy Overview

    Stake.us operates as a sweepstakes casino where you purchase "Gold Coins" and receive "Sweeps Coins" (SC) as a bonus. The SC can be redeemed for real cash prizes. While most users gamble and lose money, the VIP grinding strategy exploits multiple reward mechanisms to generate consistent profit.

    💡 The Key Insight: By combining credit card cashback, VIP bonuses, rakeback rewards, and playthrough codes, you can achieve an effective "return" above 100% - meaning you profit even while technically "losing" at the games themselves.

    Where Your Profits Come From

    The VIP grinding strategy generates profit from five distinct sources that compound together:

    💳 Credit Card Churning

    Using a cashback credit card like the Chase Unlimited gives you 1.5% back on all Stake.us purchases. On $100 daily purchases, that's $1.50 guaranteed return.

    +1.5% Guaranteed
    📅 VIP Weekly Rewards

    Active players receive weekly bonus payouts based on their VIP tier and activity level. The more you play through, the higher your weekly rewards.

    Variable Based on Tier
    🗓️ VIP Monthly Rewards

    In addition to weekly bonuses, VIP members receive monthly bonus payouts that scale with their activity and loyalty status.

    Variable Based on Tier
    🔙 VIP Rakeback

    A percentage of every wager is returned to you as rakeback. This compounds significantly when grinding large volumes through high-RTP games.

    % Back on All Wagers
    🎟️ Playthrough Codes

    Stake.us drops free SC codes on their Twitter and social media platforms. Claiming these requires recent playthrough activity, but they represent pure profit.

    Free SC (Major Profit Source)

    How to Execute the VIP Grinding Strategy

    Step 1: Purchase 4000SC with Credit Card

    Buy the maximum daily limit of 4000SC using a rewards credit card. The Chase Unlimited is recommended as it gives 1.5% back and is lenient with sweepstake spending. This purchase is the foundation of your daily grind.

    Step 2: Navigate to the Dice Game

    Go to the Dice game on Stake.us. This is the optimal game for grinding because it offers a 99% RTP (Return to Player) which minimizes your losses during playthrough. Other games have lower RTPs and will cost you more over time.

    Step 3: Configure Your Dice Settings

    Set your win chance to 98%. The goal here is NOT to gamble - it's to minimize losses while playing through your SC to unlock all the VIP rewards, rakeback, and playthrough code eligibility.

    Step 4: Run 1203 Spins at 10SC Each

    Play 1203 games at 10SC per spin. Why 1203 and not 1200? Because you need to account for the extra SC the base packs give you. 10SC × 1203 spins = 12,030SC playthrough, which exceeds the 12,000SC requirement.

    Step 5: Collect Your Rewards

    After completing your playthrough, collect all rewards: VIP weekly/monthly bonuses, rakeback, and redeem playthrough codes from social media. This is where your actual profits come from!

    Step 6: Repeat Every 7 Days

    Repeat this entire wash every 7 days to remain eligible for playthrough code collection. Consistency is key - the more you grind your VIP, the more you earn overall.

    Optimal Dice Settings

    Configure your dice settings exactly as shown for optimal grinding results

    Bet Amount
    10 SC
    Win Chance
    98%
    Number of Spins
    1,203
    Total Playthrough
    12,030 SC

    💡 Why 1203 spins? You need to account for the extra SC from base packs. 10SC × 1203 = 12,030SC, which exceeds the 12,000SC playthrough requirement needed to claim codes.

    The Math Behind Your Profits

    Here's the mathematical breakdown of why this strategy works:

    Factor Impact
    Dice RTP 99%
    Base Pack Bonus SC +1.00125%
    Credit Card Cashback +1.5%
    3x Playthrough Loss (-1% × 3) -3%
    Net Before VIP/Codes 98.625%

    📊 Final Calculation

    98.625% Base + VIP Weekly + VIP Monthly + Rakeback + Playthrough Codes = PROFIT

    The VIP rewards and playthrough codes push your effective return well above 100%, generating the $20-$30 daily profit.

    Playthrough Codes Explained

    Playthrough codes are free SC rewards dropped on Stake's Twitter and social media platforms. To claim these rewards, you need a certain amount of playthrough from the last 7 days.

    🏆 Beginner Tier

    Requires 12,000SC playthrough in the last 7 days. This is the easiest tier to achieve and is perfect for getting started with the VIP grinding strategy.

    12,000 SC Playthrough
    ⭐ Advanced Tier

    Requires 50,000SC playthrough in the last 7 days. This tier offers bigger rewards and is ideal for scaling up your earnings once you're comfortable with the strategy.

    50,000 SC Playthrough

    Automation Tools

    SweepsEdge - Auto-Claim Playthrough Codes

    Don't miss out on any playthrough codes! SweepsEdge automatically claims codes to your account as soon as they're released. Turn on the auto-claim setting and never miss a code again.

    Configure SweepsEdge to automatically claim Stake.us playthrough codes

    🤖 Auto-Claim Codes with SweepsEdge

    Never miss another playthrough code - let SweepsEdge handle automatic collection for you.

    Sign Up for SweepsEdge →

    Alternative: Perfect Blackjack with AnteBot

    For those who want an even better RTP and automated grinding, Perfect Blackjack offers 99.5% RTP. Combined with base pack bonuses and credit card cashback, you can actually profit long-term while qualifying for the higher 50,000SC playthrough codes.

    🃏

    🃏 Automate with AnteBot

    Use AnteBot to automatically run the Perfect Blackjack wash for you and save time. It handles the grinding while you focus on other things.

    Sign Up for AnteBot →

    Pro Tips for Maximum Profits

    • Start with the 12,000SC tier - It's the easiest entry point and builds your VIP status
    • Scale up over time - As your bankroll grows, work towards the 50,000SC playthrough tier for bigger rewards
    • Subscribe to daily codes - Maximize earnings by claiming codes every day, not just Saturdays
    • Saturday codes are highest value - If you prefer to avoid bans, focus on Saturday codes only
    • 7-day bans are temporary - If you get banned for over-claiming, simply resume when it lifts
    • Use the right credit card - Chase Unlimited's 1.5% cashback adds up significantly over time

    ⚠️ Important Note on Bans

    Claiming codes daily can occasionally result in 7-day temporary bans. Some users prefer to only collect Saturday codes (highest value day) to prevent bans. Choose the approach that works best for you - daily claiming is more profitable but comes with occasional breaks.

    💳 Recommended Credit Card

    The Chase Unlimited Credit Card gives 1.5% back on all purchases and is lenient with sweepstake spending - perfect for this strategy.

    Frequently Asked Questions

    How much can I realistically make with this strategy?

    Users consistently report $20-$30 daily profit, which translates to $600-$900+ monthly. Results depend on your consistency, the number of codes you claim, and your VIP tier level.

    Why use the dice game instead of other games?

    The dice game offers 99% RTP, which is among the highest on Stake.us. This minimizes your losses during the playthrough phase. Other games have lower RTPs and will cost you more over time.

    What if I get banned from claiming codes?

    Temporary 7-day bans can occur if you claim codes too frequently. These bans are temporary and lift automatically. To avoid them, some users only claim Saturday codes (highest value). The strategy remains profitable either way.

    Do I need to use the recommended credit card?

    While any cashback credit card works, the Chase Unlimited is specifically recommended because it gives 1.5% back AND is known to be lenient with sweepstakes casino transactions. Some cards may flag or decline these purchases.

    How long does it take to complete the daily wash?

    The 1203 spins at 98% win chance typically take 15-30 minutes if done manually. Using automation tools like AnteBot can reduce this to a hands-off process.

    Is this strategy risk-free?

    No strategy is completely risk-free. While the math works out to consistent profit over time, short-term variance can occur. The key is consistency over weeks and months. The 60-day money-back guarantee on tools like SweepsEdge helps mitigate tool-related risks.

    Home › Blog › Matched Betting Guide 2026
    ⚽ Matched Betting

    Matched Betting Guide 2026: Make $500–$1,500/Month Risk-Free from Sportsbook Bonuses

    📅 March 2026 ⏱ 10 min read 👤 Online Sidehustles Team

    Sportsbooks spend millions handing out free bets and sign-up bonuses to attract new customers. Matched betting is the strategy of extracting guaranteed, risk-free profit from those promotions — regardless of who wins the game. This is not gambling. This is exploiting the promotional system, and it's completely legal.

    $1,273+
    From US sign-up offers
    $800+
    Monthly from reloads
    10+
    Major US books to work
    ~0%
    Risk when done right

    📋 Table of Contents

    • 1. What Is Matched Betting?
    • 2. How It Works — The Two-Bet System
    • 3. Best US Sportsbook Offers to Target
    • 4. Realistic Income Breakdown
    • 5. US-Specific Considerations
    • 6. Stacking with Credit Cards and Sweepstakes
    • 7. Mistakes to Avoid

    What Is Matched Betting?

    Matched betting is a strategy that uses sportsbook free bet promotions to generate guaranteed profit. Instead of picking winners — which is gambling — you place two opposing bets that cover both outcomes of an event. The result cancels out, and what's left is the profit from the free bonus itself.

    It originated in the UK where it's been mainstream for 10+ years, with thousands of people earning their entire income from it. In the US it's newer but the same logic applies — sportsbooks are throwing hundreds of dollars at every new customer to win market share, and matched bettors collect that money systematically.

    💡 Simple Example — DraftKings

    DraftKings offers: "Bet $5, get $150 in bonus bets if your first bet wins."
    You bet $5 on Team A to win at odds of +100 (even money).
    You simultaneously bet $5 against Team A on a second book.
    If Team A wins: you get $150 bonus bets, cover your lay loss (~$5). Net: ~+$112 in free bets extracted.
    If Team A loses: your lay bet covers the $5 loss. Net: ~$0 out of pocket, offer not triggered — you try again.
    Either way, your downside is essentially zero. The upside is $112 in real profit.

    ⚠️ This Is NOT Gambling

    Gamblers win or lose based on the outcome. Matched bettors cover both outcomes — they don't care who wins. The profit is extracted from the bonus system, not from predicting sports. Treated as a business process, this is as close to guaranteed income as side hustles get.

    How It Works — The Two-Bet System

    Every matched bet has two parts:

    • The Back Bet: Bet FOR an outcome (e.g., Team A wins) at the sportsbook offering the bonus
    • The Lay Bet: Bet AGAINST the same outcome (e.g., Team A doesn't win) at a betting exchange or second book

    These two bets cancel each other out financially. You've now unlocked the promotional bonus without taking on any real sporting risk.

    Step-by-Step Process

    1. Find a sign-up offer — DraftKings, FanDuel, BetMGM, Caesars, BetRivers, etc. All have new-user promotions.
    2. Calculate the required qualifying bet — use an odds matching calculator to find the best market to minimize your qualifying loss.
    3. Place your back bet at the sportsbook — on a near 50/50 market (a spread at -110/-110 is ideal).
    4. Place your lay bet at Sporttrade, Prophet Exchange, or a second sportsbook at close to the same odds.
    5. Let the bet settle. You receive your bonus bet credit.
    6. Convert the bonus bet to cash — place the free bet on a higher-odds market (like +300 or higher), cover the lay side. You extract ~70–80% of the free bet as real cash regardless of outcome.
    7. Repeat with the next sportsbook.

    Best US Sportsbook Offers to Target in 2026

    Work through these in order. Each can only be used once per person.

    SportsbookCurrent Offer TypeApprox. ValueExtracted (~75%)
    DraftKingsBet $5, Get $150 bonus bets$150~$112
    FanDuelBet $5, Get $200 bonus bets$200~$150
    BetMGMFirst Bet Insurance up to $1,500$1,500~$337 (on $450 qualifying)
    CaesarsFirst Bet Insurance up to $1,000$1,000~$225 (on $300 qualifying)
    BetRiversSecond Chance Bet up to $500$500~$112
    Bet365Bet $1 Get $200 bonus bets$200~$150
    PointsBet / Hard RockVarious $200–$500 offers$350 avg~$185

    Realistic Income Breakdown

    📊 Phase 1 — Sign-Up Offers (One Time)

    Working through 7–10 major US sportsbooks at ~75% extraction rate: ~$1,000–$1,500 total profit.
    Timeframe: 4–8 weeks (one book per week, waiting for qualifying bets to settle).
    Capital required: $200–$500 in a float (money moves between accounts, not spent).

    📊 Phase 2 — Ongoing Reload Promos (Every Month)

    Every book runs weekly promos: odds boosts, parlay insurance, reload bonuses, game-specific offers.
    Realistic monthly extraction from 5–6 accounts: $300–$800/month ongoing.
    More accounts = more monthly income. Experienced matched bettors manage 15+ accounts.

    US-Specific Considerations

    Betting Exchanges

    The UK uses Betfair for lay betting. In the US, your main options are:

    • Sporttrade — available in NJ, PA, CO, AZ, and expanding. True exchange with lay betting.
    • Prophet Exchange — newer, growing state list. No-vig exchange model.
    • Second sportsbook as hedge — if no exchange is available in your state, use a second sportsbook running the opposite promo to hedge instead.

    State Availability

    Legal sports betting is live in 35+ states. Check your state — if it's legal, you have access to multiple sportsbook sign-up offers. Each one is money on the table.

    Taxes

    US sportsbook winnings are taxable. Keep a log of all qualifying bets, lay bets, and bonus bet conversions. Report net gambling winnings on Schedule 1. Talk to a tax professional if you're extracting significant amounts.

    Account Restrictions ("Gubbing")

    Sportsbooks can limit or ban accounts they identify as bonus abusers. To stay under the radar:

    • Don't always take maximum promo amounts
    • Place occasional small recreational bets alongside your matched bets
    • Bet on popular, mainstream markets — not obscure events
    • Don't withdraw immediately after every bonus — let money sit briefly

    Stacking with Credit Cards and Sweepstakes

    + Credit Card Churning

    Fund your sportsbook accounts using a new credit card you're trying to hit the minimum spend on. You extract matched betting profit from the sportsbook AND unlock your card sign-up bonus from the same deposit. One transaction, two income streams.

    Example: Fund BetMGM with $450 via your new Chase Sapphire Preferred. That $450 counts toward your $4,000 minimum spend. Meanwhile, you extract ~$337 from the BetMGM first-bet offer. You've earned money on both sides of the same deposit.

    + Sweepstakes Casino Strategy

    The mental model is identical — you're not gambling on outcomes, you're systematically working through a list of promotional offers to extract guaranteed value. If you're already doing sweepstakes daily collections, you have exactly the right mindset and discipline for matched betting. Same system, different platform.

    ⚽ Full Matched Betting Strategy + Community

    Join our Discord where members share live promo alerts, US sportsbook offers, state availability guides, and strategies for stacking matched betting with sweepstakes and credit card churning.

    Join the Community →

    Mistakes to Avoid

    • Not using a float — you need capital moving between accounts. Start with $200–$500 so you always have funds available. This money isn't spent, just circulated.
    • Rushing qualifying bets — pick markets near 50/50 odds (-110/-110) to minimize your qualifying loss. Don't bet +500 underdogs as your qualifying bet.
    • Skipping the lay bet — this turns matched betting into actual gambling. Always cover the other side before the event starts.
    • Betting on the same event you've laid — if you forget to place your lay, don't panic-place it during the game when odds have moved. Eat the qualifying loss and wait for the next opportunity.
    • Withdrawing instantly every time — flags your account. Let the float sit naturally and withdraw periodically.
    • Not tracking everything — use a spreadsheet. Record every back bet, lay bet, odds, stake, and outcome. You need this for taxes and to know exactly where your float is at all times.
    • Doing this in an illegal betting state — check your state's legal status first. If sports betting isn't legal where you live, this strategy isn't available to you yet.

    📖 Related Guides

    🎯 Strategy 📅 Published: March 5, 2026 ⏱️ 15 min read

    How to Maximize Sweepstakes Casino Winnings: Strategy Guide 2026

    Collecting daily collection bonuses is just the starting point. If you want to push your sweepstakes casino earnings from "decent side income" to "genuinely life-changing money," you need to play smarter — not harder.

    This guide covers the strategies that separate people earning $300/month from those pulling $2,000-4,000+. Everything from game selection and bankroll management to package timing and VIP grinding.

    📋 Table of Contents

    • Game Selection: The Foundation
    • Understanding RTP (Return to Player)
    • Bankroll Management
    • Package Timing Strategy
    • VIP Grinding
    • Bonus Optimization
    • Common Traps to Avoid
    • Advanced Tips
    • FAQ

    🎮 Game Selection: The Foundation

    Not all casino games are created equal. The games you choose to play with your Sweeps Coins directly impact how much you keep vs. how much the house takes. This is the single most important strategic decision you'll make.

    Best Game Types for SC Preservation

    Game TypeTypical RTPVolatilityRecommended?
    Blackjack (basic strategy)99.5%Low⭐ Best for playthrough
    Dice (e.g., Stake.us)98-99%Adjustable⭐ Excellent for grinding
    Video Poker (Jacks+)99.5%Low-Medium✅ Very good
    Baccarat98.9%Low✅ Good
    Roulette (European)97.3%Medium✅ Acceptable
    Slots (high RTP)96-97%High⚠️ Okay for fun, risky for profit
    Slots (low RTP)88-94%Very High❌ Avoid for SC management
    Keno / Scratch Cards75-92%Very High❌ Never for profit

    💡 The Rule of Thumb

    When you need to play through SC (for playthrough requirements), always pick games with 96%+ RTP. On a $100 playthrough at 96% RTP, you'll statistically keep $96. At 90% RTP, you'd keep only $90. Over thousands of plays, that 6% difference is massive. New to all this? Start with our beginner guide first.

    📊 Understanding RTP (Return to Player)

    RTP is the percentage of money a game returns to players over time. A 96% RTP slot means that for every $100 wagered, the game returns $96 on average (the house keeps $4).

    Key things to understand about RTP:

    • It's a long-term average — In any single session, you could win big or lose everything. RTP plays out over thousands of spins.
    • Higher RTP = less loss over time — This is especially important when you need to play through SC to meet redemption requirements.
    • Table games generally have higher RTP than slots — Blackjack with basic strategy is 99.5%, while most slots are 92-96%.
    • Some games don't count toward playthrough — Many sites exclude table games or weight them at 10-20% of slots. Always check the terms.

    How to Find a Game's RTP

    Most sweepstakes casinos display RTP in the game info/rules section. Click the "i" or "?" icon within the game. If it's not shown, Google "[game name] RTP" — providers like Pragmatic Play publish RTPs on their official sites. Check our glossary for more terminology.

    💰 Bankroll Management

    Whether you're playing with free SC or bought packages, managing your bankroll properly is what separates winners from people who burn through their balance.

    Rule #1: The 1-2% Rule

    Never bet more than 1-2% of your total SC balance on a single game or spin. If you have 500 SC, your max bet should be 5-10 SC. This prevents variance from wiping you out and gives you enough spins for the RTP to work in your favor.

    Rule #2: Set Win/Loss Limits

    Before each session, decide:

    • Win limit: "I'll stop if I'm up 30% from my starting balance"
    • Loss limit: "I'll stop if I've lost 20% of my session bankroll"

    Hitting either limit means you stop. No exceptions. The biggest losses come from chasing after a bad streak or getting greedy during a good one.

    Rule #3: Separate Your Bankrolls

    Keep your "daily bonus SC" separate from your "playthrough SC" mentally (or track in a spreadsheet). Daily bonuses are pure profit — don't gamble them away on slots. If you want to play for fun, use the Gold Coins.

    ⏰ Package Timing Strategy

    If you're doing package churning (buying welcome packages for the bonus SC), timing your purchases can significantly increase your returns.

    When to Buy Packages

    • During promotional events — Sites regularly run "double SC" or "bonus package" promotions. Wait for these.
    • Start of the month — Some sites reset monthly bonuses. Fresh month = best package deals.
    • After reaching VIP tiers — Higher VIP levels get better package value. Level up first, buy later.
    • When you have a cashback offer stacked — Using Skrill or a cashback credit card means you earn money back on the purchase itself.

    Package Value Calculation

    Before buying any package, calculate the SC-to-dollar ratio:

    Formula: (Bonus SC value in USD) ÷ (Package price) × 100 = Return percentage

    Example: A $20 package that gives 30 SC worth $15 = 75% return before playthrough. If you play through at 96% RTP, you keep about $14.40 — so your net cost is $5.60 for $14.40 in value. That's a ~157% return. Full strategy details in our churning guide.

    👑 VIP Grinding

    Most sweepstakes casinos have VIP or loyalty programs that reward consistent play with better bonuses, higher daily SC, and exclusive perks.

    Stake.us VIP System

    Stake.us has the most profitable VIP system in the sweepstakes space. The rakeback program returns a percentage of everything you wager — which adds up fast when grinding high-volume, low-variance games like Dice. Players grinding Stake VIP earn an extra $20-30/day on top of their regular daily bonuses. Full breakdown in our Stake.us grinding guide.

    LuckyLand Slots VIP

    LuckyLand's tier system (Green Duck → Blue Duck → Yellow Duck → Blue Diamond) unlocks "Quacky Hours" — exclusive time windows where you get boosted bonuses worth $200+/month. Check our LuckyLand VIP guide for tier requirements and unlocking strategies.

    General VIP Tips

    • Focus on 3-5 sites for VIP — Don't spread your play too thin. Concentrated play = faster VIP progression.
    • Use daily bonuses to fuel VIP progress — Your free SC plays count toward VIP advancement.
    • Check VIP benefits before grinding — Not all VIP programs are equally valuable. Focus on sites where higher tiers genuinely pay off.

    🎁 Bonus Optimization

    Maximize Welcome Bonuses

    Every sweepstakes casino offers a welcome bonus. Some give you free SC immediately; others require a first purchase to unlock the full bonus package. Strategy:

    • Claim every free signup bonus across all sites (see our complete site list)
    • For sites that require purchase: wait for promotional periods when purchase bonuses are doubled
    • Calculate the effective value before buying (as shown above)

    Streak Bonus Strategy

    Consecutive login streaks multiply your daily bonuses. At many sites, Day 30+ bonuses are 3-5x what you get on Day 1. Never break a streak unless absolutely necessary. Here's how to protect them:

    • Set daily alarms for collection time
    • Use automation tools that collect even when you're busy
    • If traveling, use mobile to collect from critical high-bonus sites
    • Prioritize streak sites first in your daily routine

    Social Media Bonuses

    Many sites give extra SC for following them on social media, joining their Facebook groups, or engaging with posts. These are usually one-time bonuses of 0.5-5 SC each — small individually but they add up across 70+ sites.

    ⚠️ Common Traps to Avoid

    ❌ Trap #1: Chasing Losses

    You lost 50 SC on a bad slot session. The impulse is to bet bigger to "win it back." Don't. This is exactly how real money casinos profit from people. Stick to your bankroll rules and walk away. The daily bonuses will replenish your balance over time.

    ❌ Trap #2: Playing High-Volatility Slots with Playthrough SC

    High-volatility slots can pay massive jackpots, but they also drain your balance fast. When you need to play through SC to meet redemption requirements, ALWAYS use low-volatility, high-RTP games. Save the flashy slots for Gold Coins.

    ❌ Trap #3: Ignoring Playthrough Weightings

    Some sites weight game contributions differently. For example, slots might count 100% toward playthrough while blackjack only counts 10%. This means you'd need to wager 10x more at blackjack to clear the same playthrough. Always check the terms before you start playing through.

    ❌ Trap #4: Buying Packages Without Calculating Value

    Not every package is a good deal. Some give you terrible SC-to-dollar ratios. Always do the math before purchasing. If the effective return after playthrough is less than 100%, it's not worth it. Our churning guide shows you exactly how to evaluate packages.

    🧠 Advanced Tips

    1. Track everything in a spreadsheet. Daily SC earned, SC played, SC cashed out, package costs, payout amounts. Data is how you optimize. You can't improve what you don't measure.
    2. Stack payment method bonuses. Use Skrill for 0% fees and True Skriller cashback. Use a cashback credit card for purchases. Stack credit card churning rewards with sweepstakes purchases.
    3. Time your cashouts. Some sites process payouts faster on weekdays. Submit redemptions Monday-Wednesday morning for the fastest turnaround. Read our payout guide for site-specific timelines.
    4. Use multiple devices. Open high-bonus sites on your computer while collecting from smaller sites on your phone. This cuts your daily collection time in half.
    5. Join the community. Our Discord server has 2,300+ members sharing strategies, new site alerts, and promo codes in real-time. Community knowledge is your biggest edge.
    6. Reinvest strategically. When you cash out from daily bonuses, consider reinvesting a portion into package churning on new sites. The welcome packages on new sites typically have the best value.

    ❓ FAQ

    Can I actually win consistently at sweepstakes casinos?

    With daily bonuses alone — yes, guaranteed. The house gives you free SC daily and you cash out the accumulation. With gameplay, it depends on your game selection and bankroll management. High-RTP games minimize losses, and combined with free bonuses, net positive results are very achievable. Read the full breakdown in our sweepstakes vs real money comparison.

    What's the best single game for grinding?

    Blackjack with basic strategy (99.5% RTP) or Stake.us Dice (98-99% RTP, adjustable). Both have minimal variance and the highest return rates. Dice is particularly good because you can set it to auto-play at specific bet sizes.

    How do I know if a package is worth buying?

    Calculate: (Bonus SC dollar value × expected RTP) ÷ Package price. If the result is over 1.0, it's profitable. Example: $20 package gives SC worth $18, you play at 97% RTP → $18 × 0.97 = $17.46 ÷ $20 = 0.87. This one loses money. But a $10 package giving SC worth $15 → $15 × 0.97 = $14.55 ÷ $10 = 1.45. This one profits.

    Should I play games or just collect daily bonuses?

    If you're risk-averse, just collect daily bonuses — it's guaranteed income. If you want to accelerate earnings, play strategically with high-RTP games. The optimal approach is collecting from all sites daily AND playing through at sites where you're building toward VIP tiers.

    🎯 Start Optimizing Today

    The strategies in this guide can take your sweepstakes earnings from "nice pocket change" to a serious income stream. Start by fixing your game selection (high RTP only), implement basic bankroll management, and never break your streaks.

    If you're brand new, start with our beginner guide first. Already collecting daily? Check out package churning for the next level.

    Learn Package Churning →

    🆕 New Sites

    New Sweepstakes Casinos 2026: Latest Sites Launched & Reviewed

    📅 March 2026 ⏱ 7 min read 👤 Online Sidehustles Team

    The sweepstakes casino space is growing fast. New sites launched in late 2025 and early 2026 mean more daily SC to collect, more welcome packages to churn, and more opportunities to stack monthly income. Here's our complete breakdown of every major new site worth your attention.

    📌 Why New Sites Matter

    Each new verified site you sign up to adds to your daily collection permanently. Even a site giving $0.20/day adds $6/month — and welcome packages from new sites can be worth $50–$200+ in SC profit. New sites = permanent income increases.

    📋 Table of Contents

    • MetaWin.us
    • MegaSpinz
    • BangCoins
    • EpicSweep
    • LuckyRush
    • Playtana
    • BankRolla
    • Coinz.us
    • Lucky Canoe
    • LuckLake
    • Quick Comparison Table

    MetaWin.us — Launched November 2025

    ⭐ MetaWin.us

    New 2025High Tier

    Parent Company: MW Services Limited (same parent as WOW Vegas and Rolla)

    Daily SC: $0.20–$0.50 via daily drops  |  Min Redemption: $100 SC

    Welcome Package: 10,000 GC no deposit + ongoing daily SC drops

    MetaWin.us is the newest addition to the WOW Vegas family — one of the most trusted operators in the sweepstakes space. With 1,300+ games and a 95/100 safety rating, it's already positioning itself as a top-tier daily collection site. Crypto-only for redemptions. Features Hacksaw Gaming (Great Pigsby ✅, Kraken's Hunger ✅) and Booming Games (Mummy's Gold ✅).

    Restricted states: CA, CT, ID, LA, MD, MI, MT, NV, NJ, NY, TN, WA

    MegaSpinz — Launched October 2025

    ⭐ MegaSpinz

    New 2025High Tier

    Parent Company: Petique Labs LLC (CogniPlay platform, same as Spinfinite)

    Daily SC: $0.20–$0.30 + daily promos  |  Min Redemption: $100 SC

    Welcome Package: Up to 67,500 GC + 52.5 SC for $19.99 (150% extra)

    MegaSpinz launched on the proven CogniPlay platform with 1,000+ games from 26+ providers. It stands out for offering up to 15% extra free SC value on regular Gold Coin purchases — a unique ongoing incentive. Has Relax Gaming (Epic Joker ✅) and Ezugi live tables (Auto Roulette ✅). Sports Picks feature available.

    Restricted states: CA, CT, ID, LA, MI, MT, NV, NH, NY, WA

    BangCoins — Launched February 2026

    🆕 BangCoins

    New 2026High Tier

    Parent Company: WW Funcrafters JWA LLC (same parent as DimeSweeps and SweepsRoyal)

    Daily SC: $0.20–$0.30  |  Min Redemption: $100 SC

    Welcome Package: 50,000 GC + 1 SC no deposit, up to 200% extra SC on first purchase

    The newest major 2026 launch, BangCoins is already impressive with 3,100+ games — one of the largest libraries of any new entrant. It comes from a trusted operator with a proven track record (DimeSweeps, SweepsRoyal). Has Evolution Gaming for Auto Roulette ✅ and 35+ states covered. Accepts crypto, Apple Pay, and Google Pay.

    Restricted states: CA, CT, DE, HI, ID, LA, MI, MT, NV, NJ, NY, WA

    EpicSweep — Launched December 2025

    ⭐ EpicSweep

    New 2025Medium Tier

    Parent Company: Epic Social Play Inc

    Daily SC: $0.20–$0.50  |  Min Redemption: $100 SC

    Welcome Package: 100,000 GC + 1 SC no deposit, first-purchase discounts available

    EpicSweep entered the market in December 2025 with a unique VIP Coinback system that rewards active players. Has Evolution Gaming (Auto Roulette ✅) and Hacksaw Gaming (Great Pigsby ✅, Kraken's Hunger ✅). Age requirement is 21+ on this site. Supports both crypto and traditional payment methods.

    Restricted states: CA, CT, DE, ID, LA, MI, MT, NV, NJ, NY, WA

    LuckyRush — Launched 2025

    ⭐ LuckyRush

    New 2025Medium Tier

    Parent Company: LuckyRush.io Limited Inc

    Daily SC: $0.20  |  Min Redemption: $100 SC

    Welcome Package: 33,333 GC + 33 SC for $9.99 (first-purchase discount)

    LuckyRush stands out with one of the largest game libraries available — 3,000+ games. It supports PayPal, Cash App, Venmo, Chime, Bitcoin, and Gift Cards — broader payment options than most competitors. Has Evolution (Auto Roulette ✅) and Hacksaw Gaming (Great Pigsby ✅, Kraken's Hunger ✅). Instant push-to-card payouts available. 24/7 live chat and phone support.

    Restricted states: CA, CT, ID, LA, MD, MA, MI, MT, NV, NJ, NY, WA, WV

    Playtana — Launched December 2025

    ⭐ Playtana

    New 2025Medium Tier

    Parent Company: UTech Solutions LLC (same parent as SweepShark and ScarletSands)

    Daily SC: $0.20–$0.30  |  Min Redemption: $100 SC

    Welcome Package: 175,000 GC + 1 SC no deposit, 100% more SC on first purchase

    Playtana is a slots-focused platform from the proven UTech Solutions operator. Has Booming Games (Mummy's Gold ✅) and a solid 1,300+ game library. Straightforward interface, 100% bonus SC on first purchase makes the welcome package strong for churning.

    Restricted states: CA, CT, DE, ID, LA, MI, MT, NV, NJ, NY, RI, TN, WA, WV, WY

    BankRolla — Launched May 2025

    ⭐ BankRolla

    New 2025Medium Tier

    Parent Company: Epic Play Holding Inc

    Daily SC: $0.20–$0.50  |  Min Redemption: $100 SC

    Welcome Package: 200,000 GC + 2 SC no deposit; $23.99 for 65,000 GC + 65 SC

    BankRolla brings a mobile app, Quest bonus system, and VIP Club to a 900+ game library. Has Booming Games (Mummy's Gold ✅). The Quest system provides extra SC rewards for completing daily challenges — good for active players who want to do more than just collect daily bonuses.

    Restricted states: CA, CT, DE, ID, KY, LA, MI, MS, MT, NV, NJ, NY, VA, WA, DC, WV

    Coinz.us — Launched October 2025

    ⭐ Coinz.us

    New 2025Medium Tier

    Parent Company: Nickle Tech LLC

    Daily SC: $0.20 + daily quests  |  Min Redemption: $100 SC

    Welcome Package: 10,000 GC + 1 SC no deposit; 250,000 GC + 25 SC for $9.99

    Coinz.us takes a community-first approach with a visible community chat built into the lobby — unique in the sweepstakes space. Has a daily quests system that adds SC rewards beyond the standard login bonus. Has Booming Games (Mummy's Gold ✅). Smaller library (500+ games) but quality titles.

    Restricted states: CA, CT, ID, LA, MI, NJ, NY, WA, WV

    Lucky Canoe — Launched July 2025

    ⭐ Lucky Canoe

    New 2025Medium Tier

    Parent Company: Rad Software LLC

    Daily SC: $0.10–$0.30  |  Min Redemption: $500 SC ⚠️

    Welcome Package: 2,000 GC + 1.2 SC no deposit

    Lucky Canoe is unique for its physical game terminal locations and 1,500+ game library including sportsbook and poker. Supports Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal, and ACH. The major drawback is the $500 minimum redemption — plan your balance accordingly before you start collecting on this one.

    Restricted states: CA, CT, ID, LA, MI, MT, NV, NJ, NY

    LuckLake — Launched June 2024

    ⭐ LuckLake

    New 2024Medium Tier

    Parent Company: Rad Software LLC (same parent as Lucky Canoe)

    Daily SC: $0.10–$0.30  |  Min Redemption: $500 Lake Cash ⚠️

    Welcome Package: 2,000 GC + 1.20 Lake Cash no deposit

    LuckLake (currency called "Lake Cash") offers instant and same-day redemptions — one of the fastest payout processes available. Features 1,800+ games including live dealers, sportsbook, and poker. Physical game terminals available in Wisconsin. Same high minimum redemption caveat as Lucky Canoe — plan your collecting accordingly.

    Restricted states: CA, CT, ID, LA, MI, MT, NV, NJ, NY

    Quick Comparison Table

    SiteLaunchedDaily SCMin RedeemGames
    MetaWin.usNov 2025$0.20–$0.50$1001,300+
    MegaSpinzOct 2025$0.20–$0.30$1001,000+
    BangCoinsFeb 2026$0.20–$0.30$1003,100+

    OpenClaw AI Setup Tutorial 2026: Build Your Own Personal AI Agent That Makes Money
    ← Home Online Sidehustles

    🗺️ Getting Started Roadmap 🔧 Calculators & Tools 📊 SweepStats Tracker ❓ FAQ / Help Center 📖 Glossary of Terms 💰 Earnings Potential 🎁 Best Welcome Packages ⚡ Fastest Payout Sites 📩 Newsletter Signup 🃏 Best Sweepstakes Card
    🧳 Online Selling
    🤖 Sell on eBay Automated 📱 Sell on TikTok Automated 📦 Tracking Number Generator
    💸 Online Sidehustles
    📊 Reverse Stock Arbitrage 🎲 Sportsbetting Automated 💳 Credit Card Churning 💰 Best Credit Cards ⚽ Matched Betting 🤖 OpenClaw AI Setup 🎁 Reward Apps
    📊 More
    📝 Blog 🔥 Chumba vs Stake.us 📈 Income Reports ℹ️ About Us 📧 Contact
    AI Automation Make Money with AI March 7, 2026

    Build Your Own Personal AI Agent That Actually Makes You Money

    This is the exact setup I use. OpenClaw runs on your VPS, connects to Discord, and handles coding projects, content creation, client work, and business automation — even when you're offline.

    Follow along with the full video tutorial covering installation, Discord setup, and automation workflows.

    Honestly, OpenClaw changed everything for me. I was spending hours manually managing client projects, writing content, responding to messages, and handling repetitive tasks. Now? It all runs itself.

    This isn't some cloud service that could shut down tomorrow. You own it. OpenClaw runs on your VPS, uses your API keys, and follows your rules. It's like having a dedicated assistant who never sleeps, never takes breaks, and costs you maybe $5/month to host.

    What OpenClaw actually does: Manages your coding projects, writes content, handles client communication, automates workflows, builds websites, researches markets, and generates income — 24/7, completely hands-free.

    Why OpenClaw Is Perfect for Making Money with AI

    Most AI assistants live in a chat box. OpenClaw lives in your workflow. It connects to Discord, Twitter, Gmail, your VPS — everywhere you actually work. Here's what makes it special:

    • Always online — Your AI doesn't log off when you do. It keeps working while you sleep.
    • Discord integration — Get notifications, run commands, manage your communities and client servers.
    • Automation-ready — Connects with your Python scripts, monitors processes, handles coding tasks.
    • Income tracking — Logs freelance earnings, tracks project progress, generates client reports.
    • Content creation — Writes blog posts, social media content, client copy, marketing materials.

    The best part? It learns your patterns. After a week, it knows which clients you work with, how you like your code formatted, when you're usually active. It becomes your assistant.

    What You'll Need

    The setup is simpler than you think. You need:

    • A VPS — I recommend DigitalOcean ($5/month) or Vultr. Ubuntu 22.04 works great.
    • Discord bot token — Free, takes 2 minutes to create
    • OpenAI API key — Or Anthropic Claude, whatever you prefer
    • 15 minutes — Seriously, the video tutorial covers everything

    Total monthly cost: Around $5 for hosting + your AI API usage (usually $10-30/month depending on how much you use it).

    Step-by-Step Setup

    1

    Get Your VPS Running

    Spin up an Ubuntu 22.04 server. DigitalOcean's $5 droplet handles this easily. SSH in and update everything:

    sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade -y

    2

    Install Node.js and Dependencies

    OpenClaw runs on Node.js. The easiest way:

    curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | sudo -E bash -
    sudo apt-get install -y nodejs

    3

    Install OpenClaw

    This is where the magic happens:

    npm install -g openclaw

    That's it. OpenClaw is now installed globally on your system.

    4

    Create Your Discord Bot

    Go to Discord Developer Portal, create a new application, then a bot. Copy the token — you'll need it.

    Invite the bot to your server with Administrator permissions (or just the permissions you actually need).

    5

    Configure and Launch

    Run openclaw gateway start and follow the setup wizard. It'll ask for your Discord token, AI API keys, and preferences.

    Once configured, OpenClaw starts monitoring Discord and responds to messages. Try sending it a message!

    Why This Setup Beats Everything Else

    I've tried ChatGPT Plus, Claude Pro, every AI assistant out there. They're fine for one-off questions, but they don't stick around. With OpenClaw:

    • Persistent memory — It remembers your clients, coding preferences, ongoing projects
    • Active monitoring — Checks your automation scripts, alerts you to errors
    • Multi-platform — Works across Discord, Twitter, email, wherever you are
    • Customizable — Install skills, modify behavior, make it yours
    • No limits — Use it as much as you want, no daily message caps

    Plus, since it runs on your infrastructure, your data stays private. No company is training models on your business strategies.

    Real-World Money-Making Automation

    Here's how I actually use OpenClaw to make money day-to-day:

    • Client work — Writes code, handles support tickets, manages project timelines
    • Content creation — Writes blog posts, social media content, marketing copy for clients
    • Business automation — Builds websites, creates landing pages, automates workflows
    • Research & analysis — Finds leads, analyzes markets, compiles data reports
    • Community management — Manages Discord servers, responds to inquiries, moderates chats

    It's like having a business partner who never gets tired and works for the cost of a coffee per month.

    Ready to set up your own AI assistant?

    The video tutorial walks through everything step-by-step. Plus, check out our full setup guide for detailed instructions and troubleshooting tips.

    📺 Watch Tutorial → 📖 Full Setup Guide

    Common Questions

    How much does it cost to run?
    VPS hosting: $5/month. AI API usage: $10-30/month depending on how much you use it. Way cheaper than hiring an actual assistant.

    Is it safe?
    You control everything. OpenClaw runs on your server, uses your API keys, and you can see all the code. It's open source.

    Do I need to be technical?
    Basic VPS comfort helps, but the video tutorial covers everything. If you can follow along with YouTube, you can set this up.

    What if something breaks?
    OpenClaw has auto-restart, error logging, and the community is helpful. Plus, since you own it, you're not dependent on some company's uptime.

    The Bottom Line

    If you're serious about making money with AI, you need your own assistant. Manually handling client work, content creation, and project management? That's not sustainable. Responding to messages and managing tasks 24/7? You'll burn out.

    OpenClaw handles the repetitive stuff so you can focus on strategy, growth, and scaling your income. It's the difference between trading time for money and building systems that make money.

    The setup takes 15 minutes. The value lasts forever.

    Start building your AI assistant today

    Follow the tutorial, join our Discord community, and start automating your side hustles.

    🚀 Get Started Now →

    Questions about OpenClaw setup? Join our Discord community — we're always happy to help with AI automation and making money online.

    Home › Blog › OpenClaw Setup Guide 2026
    🤖 AI Automation

    OpenClaw AI Setup Guide 2026: Run Your Own AI Assistant 24/7 on a VPS

    📅 March 2026 ⏱ 10 min read 👤 Online Sidehustles Team

    OpenClaw is an open-source AI assistant that runs on your own server, connects to your Discord, and works 24/7 — even when you're offline. It handles everything from answering questions and writing content to running shell commands and managing files, all from a simple Discord message.

    Full setup takes under 15 minutes. Here's the complete walkthrough.

    ~15 min
    Full setup time
    24/7
    Online on VPS
    Free
    Open source
    Discord
    Primary interface

    📋 Table of Contents

    • 1. What Is OpenClaw?
    • 2. Step 1 — Get a VPS
    • 3. Step 2 — Install OpenClaw
    • 4. Step 3 — Add Your AI API Key
    • 5. Step 4 — Create a Discord Bot
    • 6. Step 5 — Connect to Discord
    • 7. Step 6 — Go Live
    • 8. What I Use It For

    1. What Is OpenClaw?

    OpenClaw is an open-source personal AI framework. Think of it as a bridge between a powerful AI model (Claude, GPT-4, etc.) and your own infrastructure. Instead of chatting with a generic AI through a browser, you get an AI that:

    • Lives permanently on your server or VPS
    • Responds directly in your Discord server or DMs
    • Has access to your files, can run commands, search the web, take screenshots, and execute code
    • Maintains memory across conversations so it learns your preferences over time
    • Can be extended with "skills" — pre-built modules for specific tasks
    • Runs completely autonomously while you're offline

    The key difference from just using Claude.ai in a browser: this runs on YOUR server, under YOUR control, with access to YOUR tools. The AI can actually do things — not just talk about them.

    2. Step 1 — Get a VPS

    To run OpenClaw 24/7 you need a VPS — a cloud computer that stays on all the time. You SSH into it, install OpenClaw, and from that point it runs independently whether your personal computer is on or not.

    ✅ Recommended VPS: Virtarix

    I personally use Virtarix for my OpenClaw deployment. Windows VPS options, fast setup, reliable uptime. Exactly what you need for a 24/7 AI assistant — no unnecessary bloat.

    Plan I use: WIN VPS M — 6 CPU cores · 16 GB RAM · 100 GB NVMe · Unlimited bandwidth · From $27.40/month. More than enough headroom for OpenClaw and anything else you run alongside it.

    💡 Windows vs Linux VPS

    OpenClaw runs on both. A Windows VPS is a great choice if you're already comfortable with the Windows environment — you connect via Remote Desktop (RDP) instead of SSH, and run commands in PowerShell. The OpenClaw installer has a dedicated Windows version so the setup process is just as smooth.

    3. Step 2 — Install OpenClaw

    Once your VPS is running, connect via SSH and update the system first:

    STEP 1 — CONNECT VIA RDP

    Remote Desktop Into Your VPS

    Your VPS provider will email you the IP address, username, and password. On your local Windows machine, open Remote Desktop Connection (press Win+R, type mstsc, hit Enter), enter the VPS IP, and log in.

    Once inside, right-click the Start menu and open Windows PowerShell (Admin).

    STEP 2 — INSTALL

    Run the OpenClaw Installer

    One PowerShell command handles everything — Node.js detection, installation, and the onboarding wizard:

    iwr -useb https://openclaw.ai/install.ps1 | iex

    The installer will detect if Node.js 22+ is missing and install it automatically. Follow the onboarding prompts when they appear.

    💡 Already Have Node.js 22+?

    You can install directly via npm instead:
    npm install -g openclaw@latest
    openclaw onboard --install-daemon

    4. Step 3 — Add Your AI API Key

    OpenClaw needs an API key to power its AI responses. The easiest option in 2026 is Anthropic's Claude API. Get a key at console.anthropic.com — Claude Sonnet 4 is the sweet spot for intelligence vs. cost.

    The installer will prompt you for this during onboarding, or configure it after the fact:

    openclaw configure

    You can also use OpenAI (GPT-4o) or other supported models — OpenClaw supports multiple providers. Claude tends to give the most capable responses for the price, but either works well.

    5. Step 4 — Create a Discord Bot

    You need to create a Discord application and bot to give OpenClaw access to your server. This is the most involved step but only takes 5 minutes:

    1. Go to discord.com/developers/applications
    2. Click New Application → give it a name (whatever you want to call your AI assistant)
    3. Go to the Bot tab → click Reset Token → copy the token (save it securely)
    4. Scroll down and enable:
      • Message Content Intent
      • Server Members Intent
      • Presence Intent
    5. Go to OAuth2 → URL Generator
    6. Select scopes: bot and applications.commands
    7. Select permissions: Send Messages, Read Message History, Embed Links, Attach Files, Use Slash Commands
    8. Copy the generated URL, open it in your browser, and add the bot to your server

    💡 Finding Your Server ID

    In Discord: User Settings → Advanced → Enable Developer Mode. Then right-click your server name in the sidebar and click Copy Server ID. You'll need this when connecting OpenClaw to Discord.

    6. Step 5 — Connect to Discord

    Back in your VPS PowerShell window, add Discord as a channel. OpenClaw will walk you through the configuration:

    openclaw channels add discord

    You'll be prompted for your bot token, server (guild) ID, and which channels it should have access to. Once entered, it connects immediately.

    7. Step 6 — Start It Up and Verify

    Start the background gateway service and run the health check:

    STEP 6 — GO LIVE

    Start the Gateway

    openclaw gateway start
    openclaw status
    openclaw doctor

    If everything comes back green, head to your Discord server and send your bot a direct message. It should respond within seconds.

    The gateway is installed as a system service by default, so it auto-restarts if your VPS reboots. Verify this is working:

    openclaw gateway status

    That's it — your AI assistant is now live 24/7. Message it from anywhere in the world and it responds.

    8. What People Use It For

    Once OpenClaw is running, the community has found a ton of ways to put it to work. Here are some of the most popular use cases:

    • Personal assistant in Discord: Ask it to draft emails, summarize long articles, translate content, or answer questions — all without leaving Discord
    • Coding helper: Paste in a bug, describe what you're building, and it writes or fixes code directly. Can read and edit files on your server with no copy-pasting
    • Content creation: "Write a YouTube description for this video", "generate 10 tweet ideas about X", "rewrite this paragraph to sound more casual" — works instantly
    • Server moderation support: Set it up in a Discord server to answer FAQ questions, welcome new members, and provide info on demand without needing a human online
    • Research assistant: "Find the top 10 affiliate programs for [niche] and compare their commission rates" — it searches the web and compiles a clean summary
    • Automated reminders and monitoring: Set heartbeat checks to scan your inbox, flag important emails, remind you of upcoming deadlines, or alert you when a website goes down
    • File and data management: Rename batches of files, parse CSVs, reformat data, generate reports — all from a plain English instruction in chat
    • Learning and study tool: Quiz yourself on any topic, get explanations at any depth, have it create flashcards or study guides from notes you paste in

    The key difference from using ChatGPT in a browser: OpenClaw can actually do things on your server — read and write files, run scripts, call APIs, send messages. It's not just answering questions. It's executing tasks.

    🤖 Questions About the Setup?

    Join the Discord community. I share my exact OpenClaw configuration, the skills and extensions I use, and can answer any setup questions you run into along the way.

    Join the Community →

    © 2026 Online Sidehustles · Home · Blog · OpenClaw Setup · Discord

    💳 Payment Guide

    Skrill Sweepstakes Casinos 2026: 0% Fees & Cashback Guide

    📅 March 2026 ⏱ 6 min read 👤 Online Sidehustles Team

    If you're doing package churning across multiple sweepstakes casino sites, payment fees can quietly eat into your profits. Skrill eliminates that problem — and actually pays you back through its cashback program. Here's everything you need to know.

    0%
    Skrill deposit fees
    16+
    Compatible sites
    2.5%
    Cashback on deposits
    True Skriller
    VIP status earned by playing

    📋 Table of Contents

    • Why Use Skrill for Sweepstakes?
    • The True Skriller Program
    • Best Skrill Sweepstakes Casino Sites
    • How to Set Up Skrill
    • Pro Tips for Maximizing Skrill Benefits

    Why Use Skrill for Sweepstakes Casinos?

    Most sweepstakes casino players deposit using credit/debit cards or bank transfers. The problem: card deposits often come with 2–3% processing fees that chip away at your package churning profits. On a $100 package, that's $2–$3 lost before you even start.

    Skrill solves this in two ways:

    • 0% deposit fees — sweepstakes sites that partner with Skrill absorb the processing cost, meaning you deposit the full amount into your gaming balance
    • Cashback rewards — Skrill's True Skriller program earns you points on every deposit that convert to real cash

    For active package churners doing $500–$2,000/month in deposits across multiple sites, Skrill can save $15–$60 in fees monthly while also earning cashback on top.

    The True Skriller Program

    True Skriller is Skrill's VIP loyalty program. You earn Skrill Points on every transaction, which convert to cash deposits in your Skrill wallet.

    • Bronze: Earn points on deposits — approximately 2.5% effective cashback rate
    • Silver/Gold/Diamond: Higher point multipliers as you transact more
    • Points to Cash: Redeemable directly in your Skrill account, no minimum threshold

    💡 Real Example

    You deposit $500/month via Skrill across 5 sweepstakes sites.
    0% fees saved: ~$12.50 (vs 2.5% card fee)
    True Skriller cashback earned: ~$12.50
    Total extra value vs. card deposits: ~$25/month just from using Skrill

    Best Sweepstakes Sites That Accept Skrill

    Not all sweepstakes casinos support Skrill. Here are the verified sites in our spreadsheet that offer Skrill deposits with 0% fees:

    Top Skrill-Compatible Sites

    • Stake.us — God Tier, excellent for churning, Skrill + crypto supported
    • WOW Vegas — God Tier, trusted MW Services operator, Skrill + bank transfer
    • McLuck — God Tier, great welcome package, Skrill supported
    • Fortune Coins — God Tier, strong daily SC + Skrill deposits
    • Pulsz — God Tier, one of the oldest and most trusted, Skrill available
    • Crown Coins — High Tier, Skrill + ACH supported
    • Hello Millions — High Tier, 0% Skrill fees confirmed
    • Sportzino — High Tier, sports sweepstakes + Skrill
    • Zula Casino — High Tier, Skrill payments supported
    • NoLimitCoins — Medium Tier, crypto + Skrill supported
    • RubySweeps — Medium Tier, Skrill + bank wire
    • Modo — Medium Tier, Skrill + prepaid options
    • Spree — Medium Tier, Skrill deposits available
    • Global Poker — Medium Tier, poker-focused, Skrill compatible
    • Clubs Poker — Medium Tier, poker sweepstakes + Skrill
    • FortuneWheelz — Medium Tier, Skrill 0% fee deposits

    For the full breakdown with package details and current bonus offers for each Skrill-compatible site, see our dedicated Skrill Sweepstakes Casino page.

    How to Set Up Skrill for Sweepstakes

    1. Create a Skrill account at skrill.com — free, takes 5 minutes
    2. Verify your identity — upload your ID (required for payouts and higher transaction limits)
    3. Add funds via bank transfer or debit card to your Skrill wallet
    4. Use Skrill at checkout on any compatible sweepstakes site — select Skrill as the payment method
    5. Receive withdrawals — most sites can also send winnings back to your Skrill wallet, making cashouts faster

    ⚠️ One Account Rule

    Skrill verifies your identity during account setup. This is actually helpful for sweepstakes players — it makes your payment history consistent and your transactions harder to dispute. Keep one Skrill account per identity.

    Pro Tips for Maximizing Skrill Benefits

    • Fund your Skrill wallet via bank transfer — this has the lowest incoming fees vs. card top-ups
    • Concentrate your deposits on Skrill-supported sites first to maximize cashback points
    • Withdraw SC payouts back to Skrill — most compatible sites support this, and Skrill-to-bank transfer is fast (1–2 days)
    • Track your True Skriller points in the Skrill app — redeem monthly to compound earnings
    • Combine with package churning — the 0% fees make every churn more profitable

    💰 Strategy Guide

    Sweepstakes Casino Package Churning Guide 2026

    📅 March 2026 ⏱ 8 min read 👤 Online Sidehustles Team

    If daily collection collection is the foundation of sweepstakes casino income, package churning is where the real money is made. Our community members regularly add $1,500–$3,000+ per month on top of their daily collection using this strategy.

    $1,500+
    Monthly via churning
    99.5%
    Max RTP (Blackjack)
    1x
    Playthrough required
    87+
    Sites to churn

    📋 Table of Contents

    • 1. What Is Package Churning?
    • 2. How Sweepstakes Packages Work
    • 3. Understanding Playthrough
    • 4. Best Games for Playthrough (RTP Tier List)
    • 5. Step-by-Step Churning Strategy
    • 6. Combining Churning + Daily Collection
    • 7. FAQ

    What Is Package Churning?

    Package churning is the practice of purchasing sweepstakes casino bonus packages, playing through the Sweeps Coins (SC) on high Return-to-Player (RTP) games, and then withdrawing the remaining balance as real cash.

    Sweepstakes casinos sell packages where you receive more SC than the dollar value you spent. This incentive exists to get players spending money on their platform. The churning strategy flips this — instead of gambling away your coins, you systematically play through them with the best odds possible and pocket the profit.

    💡 Simple Example

    You buy a $50 package that gives you 75 SC. You play through all 75 SC on Auto Roulette (97.4% RTP). You end up with approximately 73 SC. You withdraw $73. Net profit: ~$23 on a $50 investment.

    How Sweepstakes Packages Work

    Every sweepstakes casino offers packages for purchase. The key numbers to look at are:

    • SC value received vs. purchase price — a $10 package giving 18 SC is better than a $10 package giving 12 SC
    • Bonus percentage — welcome packages often give 100–250% extra SC on top of the base value
    • Minimum redemption — most sites require 50–100 SC to be eligible to withdraw
    • Playthrough requirement — almost always 1x (you wager your total balance once before withdrawing)

    Welcome packages are always your best opportunity — they offer the highest SC-to-dollar ratio you'll ever see on any site. After the welcome package, sites continue to offer regular daily, happy hour, and promotional packages that keep the income stream going.

    Check the Package Sales page for current live deals across all verified sites.

    Understanding Playthrough

    Playthrough (also called a "wash") is the requirement to wager your SC balance before you can withdraw. On 99% of sweepstakes sites, this is a 1x playthrough requirement.

    What this means in practice: if you have 100 SC, you must place bets totaling at least 100 SC before you can cash out. You don't lose 100 SC — the game returns most of it based on its RTP rate. A 97% RTP game returns approximately 97 SC for every 100 SC wagered on average.

    🎯 Starting Balance Strategy

    If the minimum withdrawal is 100 SC, start your playthrough with 110–130 SC. This buffer accounts for normal variance. If you run slightly unlucky during playthrough, you'll still land above the minimum and be eligible to withdraw.

    The critical rule: once playthrough is complete, withdraw immediately. Do not continue playing. Every SC you play beyond the requirement is money you could have cashed out.

    Best Games for Playthrough (RTP Tier List)

    Always use the highest RTP game available on each site. More spins with smaller bets = math working closer to the true RTP rate in your favor.

    TierGameRTPNotes
    SS+Basic Blackjack (with strategy)99.5%Best option available anywhere
    S+Auto Roulette (bet 1-18 or Red)97.4%Simple, consistent, great for any bankroll
    SEpic Joker97.0%Relax Gaming — available on many sites
    A+Mummy's Gold96.96%Booming Games provider
    AThe Great Pigsby96.55%Hacksaw Gaming
    B+Kraken's Hunger94.2%Hacksaw Gaming

    Our Daily Collection Guide shows which high-RTP games are available on each site — use it to know which game to target before you start a playthrough session.

    ⚠️ Avoid Low-RTP Slots for Playthrough

    Many slots on sweepstakes sites have RTPs of 88–93%. Never use these for playthrough — you'll lose significantly more SC before you're eligible to withdraw. Always confirm the RTP in the game info before playing.

    Step-by-Step Churning Strategy

    Step 1 — Prioritize Welcome Packages

    Welcome packages are the single best deal you'll ever get on any site. They give the highest SC-per-dollar ratio and are available to every new player. Work through God Tier and High Tier sites first — these are ranked by overall quality and package value in our spreadsheet.

    Step 2 — Check the RTP Game Before Purchasing

    Before buying a package on any site, confirm which high-RTP game is available there. If the site only has games below 94% RTP, it may not be worth churning — save your bankroll for better sites.

    Step 3 — Use Small Bet Sizes

    Bet the minimum allowed amount per spin or hand. The more individual bets you place, the closer your actual results will track to the stated RTP. Large bets introduce more variance — you could win big or lose everything in a few spins. Small bets keep results consistent.

    Step 4 — Complete the Full Playthrough, Then Withdraw

    Play until you've wagered your full SC balance. Most sites have a playthrough tracker visible in your account dashboard. Once done — withdraw. Bank transfers take 1–5 business days. Skrill is faster (1–3 days) and available on many sites.

    Step 5 — Move to Ongoing Packages

    After welcome packages are exhausted, sites still offer regular promotional packages. WOW Vegas, Stake.us, McLuck, and Fortune Coins all have consistent happy hour and daily packages worth churning on an ongoing basis.

    Combining Churning + Daily Collection

    The most profitable players run both strategies simultaneously:

    • Daily Collection: $35–$47/day passively, fully automatable, zero investment required
    • Package Churning: Higher returns per site, requires bankroll, not capped

    A smart combined approach: let your daily SC accumulate, use a package purchase to top up your balance to the playthrough sweet spot, complete the wash, withdraw the combined total. You're earning on both the daily bonus and the package incentive in a single withdrawal.

    $1,050+
    Daily collection/month
    $1,500+
    Package churning/month
    $2,550+
    Combined monthly total

    🎰 Ready to Start?

    Check our complete site list with RTP game availability, package details, and minimum redemption amounts.

    View Full Site Guide →

    Frequently Asked Questions

    Is package churning legal?

    Yes. Sweepstakes casinos legally operate under promotional sweepstakes laws. Purchasing packages and withdrawing SC is the intended use of these platforms. You're simply being strategic about which games you use — there's nothing prohibited about playing high-RTP games.

    Do I need to deposit money to get started?

    No purchase is ever required to collect daily SC or to participate. Churning packages is an optional strategy to accelerate earnings. You can start entirely free with daily collection only.

    What's the minimum bankroll I need?

    There's no minimum. Welcome packages often start as low as $9.99–$19.99. Even with a $50–$100 bankroll working across 5–10 sites, you can generate consistent monthly returns from package churning.

    How do I know which sites have the best packages right now?

    Check our live Package Sales page — it tracks current deals, bonus percentages, and SC values across all verified sites, updated regularly.

    💳 Payouts 📅 Published: March 5, 2026 ⏱️ 14 min read

    Sweepstakes Casino Payout Guide 2026: How to Cash Out Your Winnings

    You've been collecting daily bonuses, your Sweeps Coin balance is growing, and now the big question: how do you actually get your money?

    This is the #1 thing people want to know before they trust sweepstakes casinos. And honestly? It's simpler than most people expect. But there are a few things you need to set up first — skip them and your payout could get delayed or denied entirely.

    I've personally cashed out from 30+ sweepstakes sites and have processed over $15,000 in total redemptions. Here's everything I've learned about making the payout process smooth and fast.

    📋 Table of Contents

    • How Sweepstakes Payouts Work
    • KYC Verification Explained
    • Payout Methods Compared
    • Minimum Redemption Amounts
    • Processing Times by Site
    • Tips for Faster Payouts
    • Common Issues & Solutions
    • FAQ

    💰 How Sweepstakes Payouts Work

    The payout process at every sweepstakes casino follows the same basic flow. Understanding this will save you headaches.

    Step 1: Accumulate Sweeps Coins

    Collect SC from daily collections, welcome bonuses, social media promotions, or purchasing Gold Coin packages (which come with bonus SC). Your SC balance needs to hit the site's minimum redemption threshold.

    Step 2: Meet Playthrough Requirements

    Most sites require you to "play through" your SC at least once before redeeming. This means you need to wager the SC on games. This does not mean you'll lose them — if you play a 96% RTP slot and wager 100 SC, you'll statistically keep about 96 SC. Learn more about game selection in our winnings optimization guide.

    Step 3: Complete KYC Verification

    Before your first withdrawal, the site will ask you to verify your identity. This is a one-time process (covered in detail below).

    Step 4: Submit Redemption Request

    Choose your payout method, enter the amount, and submit. The site reviews your request and sends the money.

    Step 5: Receive Your Cash

    Funds arrive in your chosen account. Timing varies from instant to 5+ business days depending on the site and method.

    🪪 KYC Verification Explained

    KYC stands for "Know Your Customer" — it's the identity verification process every sweepstakes casino requires before your first payout. Think of it like cashing a check at a bank: they need to confirm you're who you say you are.

    What You'll Need

    • Government-issued photo ID — Driver's license, passport, or state ID
    • Proof of address — Utility bill, bank statement, or official mail dated within 90 days
    • Selfie with ID — Some sites require a photo of you holding your ID
    • SSN (last 4 digits) — A few sites ask for this for tax reporting purposes

    💡 Pro Tip: Verify Before You Need To

    Don't wait until you're ready to cash out to submit your KYC documents. Do it as soon as you sign up. Verification can take 24-72 hours, and if there's an issue, you'll have time to fix it without sitting on money you can't access.

    ⚠️ Critical: Use Your Real Information

    Your account info (name, address, DOB) must exactly match your ID documents. If they don't, your verification will be rejected and your balance could be locked. Never use fake information when signing up. Read our beginner guide for proper signup procedures.

    KYC Requirements by Site

    SiteID RequiredProof of AddressSelfieAvg. Approval Time
    Stake.us✅✅❌12-24 hours
    Pulsz✅✅✅24-48 hours
    Crown Coins✅✅❌24-72 hours
    Fortune Coins✅❌❌12-24 hours
    WOW Vegas✅✅✅24-48 hours
    McLuck✅✅❌24-48 hours

    🏦 Payout Methods Compared

    Different sites offer different payout methods. Here's how they stack up:

    Bank Transfer (ACH)

    The most common method. Money goes directly to your bank account. Processing takes 2-5 business days. No fees from the sweepstakes sites, but your bank may charge a small incoming wire fee.

    Skrill

    An e-wallet that's popular with sweepstakes users because of 0% transaction fees and faster processing (often same-day). Skrill also offers a True Skriller cashback program that gives you money back on transactions. Highly recommended for high-volume users. See our full Skrill guide for setup instructions and compatible sites.

    PayPal

    Accepted by some sites. Fast processing (1-3 days) and most people already have an account. Not as widely supported as bank transfer or Skrill in the sweepstakes space.

    Gift Cards

    Some sites offer Amazon, Visa, or other gift card redemptions. Usually the fastest option (often instant) but not cash in your bank. Good for smaller redemptions or if you're under the bank transfer minimum.

    Crypto

    A few sites (like Stake.us) support Bitcoin and other cryptocurrency payouts. Processing is typically fast (minutes to hours) once approved, but you'll need a crypto wallet set up.

    MethodSpeedFeesAvailabilityBest For
    Bank Transfer2-5 daysUsually $0All sitesLarge payouts
    SkrillSame day-2 days$016+ sitesSpeed + cashback
    PayPal1-3 days$0Some sitesConvenience
    Gift CardsInstant-24h$0Most sitesSmall amounts
    CryptoMinutes-hoursNetwork feesFew sitesPrivacy + speed

    📊 Minimum Redemption Amounts

    Every site has a minimum SC balance required before you can cash out. Here's a comparison of popular platforms:

    SiteMin RedemptionSC to USD RateNotes
    Stake.us50 SC ($10)1 SC = $0.20Lowest minimum, great for beginners
    Crown Coins100 CC ($25)4 CC = $1.00Standard minimum
    Pulsz50 SC ($25)2 SC = $1.00Moderate threshold
    Fortune Coins5,000 FC ($50)100 FC = $1.00Higher minimum, but great daily bonuses
    WOW Vegas100 SC ($25)4 SC = $1.00Standard minimum
    McLuck50 SC ($20)2.5 SC = $1.00Low minimum, fast processing

    Some sites have higher minimums ($50-$100+), which is why we recommend starting with sites that have lower thresholds. You get to cash out sooner, build confidence in the system, and reinvest in more sites. Check our best casinos comparison for the full list.

    ⏱️ Processing Times by Site

    This is what everyone really wants to know: how long until the money hits your account?

    Here's the reality from my personal experience with 30+ sites:

    Speed TierProcessing TimeSites
    🟢 Fast (Under 24h)Same day - 24 hoursStake.us, Fortune Coins, McLuck
    🟡 Average (1-3 days)1-3 business daysCrown Coins, Pulsz, WOW Vegas, Chumba
    🟠 Slow (3-5 days)3-5 business daysLuckyLand, Global Poker, High 5
    🔴 Variable (1-7 days)Up to 7 business daysNewer/smaller sites

    📝 Important Note

    These times start AFTER your redemption is approved. If your KYC isn't verified yet, add another 1-3 days for that. First-time withdrawals always take longer because of the verification process. After that, subsequent payouts are much faster.

    ⚡ Tips for Faster Payouts

    1. Complete KYC immediately after signup — Don't wait until you want to cash out. Get verified on day one.
    2. Use Skrill for speed — Skrill payouts process faster than bank transfers at most sites. Plus you get cashback through their True Skriller program. Full details in our Skrill guide.
    3. Meet playthrough requirements early — Play through your SC on high-RTP games before requesting a payout so there's no hold-up.
    4. Cash out regularly — Don't let massive balances sit. Smaller, more frequent redemptions mean less risk and faster processing.
    5. Keep your documents updated — If you move or your ID expires, update your info proactively.
    6. Request payouts during business hours — Submissions made at night or on weekends won't be reviewed until the next business day.

    🔧 Common Issues & Solutions

    "My KYC was rejected"

    Most common reasons: blurry document photos, name mismatch between account and ID, or expired ID. Retake clear photos in good lighting, make sure the entire document is visible, and confirm your account details match exactly.

    "My payout has been pending for over a week"

    Contact the site's support team via live chat (most have it). Reference your redemption ID. Some sites have manual review processes that can cause delays, especially for larger amounts ($500+) or first-time withdrawals.

    "I didn't get the full amount I expected"

    Check if the site deducted a processing fee (rare but some do). Also verify the SC-to-USD conversion rate — it varies by site. Crown Coins, for example, converts at 4 CC = $1, not 1:1.

    "It says I need to complete playthrough first"

    Your SC likely hasn't been wagered yet. Head to a high-RTP slot or table game, wager the required amount, then try your redemption again. Our package churning guide explains playthrough in detail.

    ❓ FAQ

    Do I have to pay taxes on sweepstakes winnings?

    Yes. Sweepstakes winnings are considered taxable income in the US. Sites may issue a 1099 form if your total redemptions exceed $600 in a calendar year. Keep records of your deposits and withdrawals for tax purposes.

    Can I use a prepaid debit card for payouts?

    Most sites require a bank account in your name or an e-wallet like Skrill. Prepaid cards are generally not supported for outgoing payments, though some gift card options work similarly.

    What happens if I request a payout from a state where the site isn't available?

    If you registered from an allowed state but later moved to a restricted one, your existing balance should still be redeemable. Contact support before requesting — don't try to use a VPN, as that will get your account permanently banned.

    Is there a maximum payout amount?

    Most sites cap daily or weekly redemptions. Common limits range from $2,000-$10,000 per day. For most daily collectors, this won't be an issue. High-volume package churners may need to split larger payouts across multiple days.

    🎯 Bottom Line

    Sweepstakes casino payouts are real, reliable, and straightforward — as long as you set things up correctly from the start. Get your KYC done early, use Skrill or bank transfer for the best experience, and cash out regularly instead of letting huge balances accumulate.

    If you haven't started collecting yet, our complete beginner guide walks you through everything from signup to first payout.

    See the Best Sweepstakes Casinos →
